inputs.tags:
Create a beautiful, upbeat, triumphant arena rock song inspired by the spirit of classic Queen — joyful, theatrical, and emotionally uplifting.
Tempo is medium-fast, around 120–130 BPM.
Key is major and bright.
Style features piano-driven rock, anthemic guitar, rich layered harmonies, dynamic drum fills, and a powerful lead vocal with expressive range and confidence.

The song should feel celebratory, hopeful, and larger-than-life, like a crowd-sing-along anthem played in a sold-out stadium.
Vocals should be bold and charismatic, with stacked backing harmonies in the chorus.
Production should be polished, cinematic, and energetic, with a dramatic build and an explosive final chorus.
inputs.lyrics:
Verse 1
Woke up with the sun in my eyes today
World keeps turning but I’m on my way
Every doubt tried to pull me down
But I hear that rhythm, that glorious sound

Pre-Chorus
Hands in the air, feel the fire inside
Every broken dream learned how to fly

Chorus
Oh we’re shining tonight, let the whole world see
We’re louder than fear, we’re finally free
Sing it out, let your heart run wild
This is our moment — born to shine

Verse 2
Steps on the wire, but I don’t look down
Faith in the music, it carries me now
Every voice joins the rising wave
We’re not alone, we’re brave

Pre-Chorus
Feel that thunder under your skin
If this is the end, let the victory begin

Chorus
Oh we’re shining tonight, let the whole world see
We’re louder than fear, we’re finally free
Sing it out, let your heart run wild
This is our moment — born to shine

Bridge (Big Queen-Style Breakdown)
Whoa-oh, whoa-oh
Hear the crowd, hear the call
Whoa-oh, whoa-oh
We were made for it all

(Piano and harmonies swell, dramatic pause)

Final Chorus (Key Change Up)
Yeah we’re shining tonight, feel the power rise
Every dream alive in our eyes
Sing it loud, let the heavens know
We were born for this — now let it go

Outro
Born to shine
Born to shine
Yeah we were born… to shine
